overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character with blue hair and futuristic armor walking through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, passing neon signs and entering a corporate building with a clean white interior featuring a holographic globe display.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy cyberpunk street at night, surrounded by towering buildings with neon signs. A large spherical AC structure dominates the center background while the character approaches a red-lit entrance, passing an NPC leaning on a railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exterior walkway transitioning to entry corridor

events.description: moving from open street into covered walkway with classical columns
entering interior corridor with bright white artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the building exterior and entering through automatic doors into a clean corridor

entered.detail: large white classical columns lining the building exterior
clean white walls with metallic trim and linear ceiling lights
sliding glass doors leading into the main interior space

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the foggy exterior into a covered walkway lined with classical columns, then transitions through automatic doors into a brightly lit white corridor, leaving the neon-lit street behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate reception lobby with holographic display

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into wide open lobby space
holographic globe display becomes fully visible in the lobby center

agents.ego_description: walking through the corporate lobby toward the central holographic display

entered.detail: large circular ARGO logo mounted on the far wall with gold and blue coloring
floating blue holographic sphere with energy rings suspended from ceiling
curved reception counter with plants and digital displays
large wall-mounted screens showing data readouts

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious, well-lit corporate lobby with wooden floors and white walls. A large holographic globe floats in the center while the ARGO logo dominates the far wall. The environment is clean and futuristic, contrasting sharply with the gritty exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, neon-lit cyberpunk street into the sterile, high-tech interior of a corporate headquarters. It begins by trailing the character through a foggy night cityscape dominated by towering buildings and a large spherical AC structure, passing a leaning NPC toward a red-lit entrance. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the misty exterior into a covered walkway lined with classical columns before gliding through automatic doors into a bright white corridor. The environment then opens into a spacious, well-lit corporate lobby featuring polished wooden floors and white walls, leaving the dark city behind. Finally, the camera settles on a large holographic globe floating in the center of the room beneath a prominent ARGO logo on the far wall.
